(ه‎); to pass, elapse, go by, be bygone, past, over (time) ;الجو‎ له‎ خال‎ (jaww) to have free scope. have freedom of action; جمال‎ من‎ لا يخلو ‎ (jamāl) it is not without a certain beauty; مبالغة‎ من‎ يخلو‎ لا‎ (mubālaga) it is slightly exaggerated; فائدة‎ من‎ يخلو‎ لا‎ it is not quits useless; نفسه‎ إلى‎ خلا‎ to be alone with o. s.; to commune with o. s., take counsel with o. s., search one’s heart;سنوات‎ عشر‎ منذ‎ خلت‎ ḵalat munḏu ‘ašri sanawātin for the past ten years
